narrative:
Precinct Richland Southeast (precinct in Vinton County) has 496 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 14.5 percentage points.
